details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectories reports/audit/ and reports/board/ per governance contract.
reports/board/ directory missing. memory_bank/ and .cursor/automations/ (with README + specs) and reports/audit/ are present.

moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with active code files: sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, board.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, __init__.py, agents/. This directory was previously marked for removal per governance audit records.

Moltbot references found in code/config (excluding docs/reports that document removal): moltbot/ directory (6+ Python files), scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py.
